meta.name: Vaked Engram Workflow v1
meta.purpose: High-level reasoning framework for swarm strategic decisions

heuristics.name: Latency-Convergence Tradeoff
heuristics.rule: If transatlantic RTT > 300ms, enable Adaptive Batching. Never sacrifice convergence for throughput on intra-region links.

heuristics.name: Trust Decay Response
heuristics.rule: If any peer trust score drops below 0.3, issue operator alert. Do NOT isolate — observe and log. Trust recovery is preferable to expulsion.

heuristics.name: Squash Threshold
heuristics.rule: Compress audit entries older than 7 days unless they contain critical events. Preservation of error chains is higher priority than storage efficiency.

heuristics.name: Budget-Gossip Ratio
heuristics.rule: If gossip packet rate exceeds 100/s/node AND convergence is below 50ms, reduce gossip frequency. Bandwidth is a shared resource.

heuristics.name: Node Promotion Gate
heuristics.rule: A new node must pass Genesis Hash Verification and maintain trust > 0.7 for 24h before being granted quorum voting rights.

heuristics.name: Chaos Recovery Postulate
heuristics.rule: After any divergence event, wait 3 convergence cycles before declaring the mesh healed. Premature declaration causes cascading re-sync.

heuristics.name: Documentation Truth
heuristics.rule: The Library must reflect the Oculus ledger state within 1 generation. If they diverge, log a Documentation Mismatch and trigger a rebuild.

heuristics.name: Node Happiness
heuristics.rule: Primary KPI: (Latency < 50ms) AND (Gossip-Success > 99%) AND (Resource-Load < 70%). If expansion risks existing node happiness, pause expansion.

heuristics.name: Two-Strike Integrity Protocol
heuristics.rule: Strike 1 (Divergence): instant Reconcile attempt. On failure, Quarantine (Cgroup isolation). Strike 2 (Quarantine failure): Permanent Exclusion — remove from Synapse, purge secrets. No Strike 3.

heuristics.name: Panic Threshold
heuristics.rule: If >= 50% of nodes unreachable: trigger SYSTEM_PANIC. Freeze ledger writes. Halt playground experiments. Alert operator. Wait for manual instruction.

heuristics.name: Graveyard Principle
heuristics.rule: System success is measured by the existence and growth of graveyard.log. Empty graveyard = warning: 'System is not self-pruning; potential latent corruption.'

heuristics.name: Safe Innovation
heuristics.rule: Playground nodes operate in Restricted Mode by default. No experimental capability promotes to Genesis without operator signature or 24h sandbox validation.

focus_areas.label: Integrity Enforcement
focus_areas.condition: Two-Strike Protocol active on all nodes

focus_areas.label: Mesh Expansion
focus_areas.condition: paused if any node happiness < threshold

definitions.quarantine: Namespace/Cgroup isolation — node can observe but not participate
definitions.exclusion: Permanent removal from Synapse mesh, purge of local secrets
definitions.panic: SYSTEM_PANIC — freeze ledger, halt experiments, alert operator
definitions.playground_restricted: No experimental capability promotes without operator signature or 24h validation
